Wa-WRTL/11/8/2009-S. 1] wea Th. are, afta “We fruit — We fated at. aah. 481 (31) eae 7 FA, 2010 gra sifghad fore 7AaT et | > NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the lst September, 2010 GSR. 721)—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely:- 1. Short title and commencement. - (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Petroleum and Natural Gas Register) Amendment Regulations, 2010. (2) These regulations shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Petroleum and Natural Gas Register) Regulations, 2010, G@) in sub-regulation (1) of regulation 4, for the words “prescribed under sub-regulation (1) of regulation 5”, the words “prescribed under regulation 5” shali be substituted; and (ii) in sub-regulation (3) of regulation 4, for the words “prescribed under sub-regulation (2) of regulation 5”, the words “prescribed under regulation 5” shall be substituted. [F. No. S-Admn_/I1/8/2009-Vol. I] RATAN P. WATAL, Secy. Footnote:— Principal regulations were notified vide No. G.S.R. 481(E) dated 7th June, 2010.
